name: Silky Mango Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs with the sugar using an electric mixer for about 5 minutes, until pale and thick.
2. Fold in the mango puree.
3. Pour in the whipping cream.
4. Chill for a couple of hours.
5. Transfer to an ice cream maker and freeze according to manufacturer's instructions.
6. When the ice cream has formed, scoop it out of the maker into a lidded container.
7. Store in freezer until required.
